# Vle Analysis

**Summary**: The study of the phase behavior of mixtures to determine solubility and pressure/temperature boundaries.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-al-azani|AL-AZANI, 2019]] used VLE analysis to evaluate the solubility of CO2 in solvents like TEC and EB.
